description: The image shows a table listing four virtual machines in a network topology, including two Cisco IOL devices and two Ubuntu VMs. Each entry displays the name, type (cisco_iol or generic_vm), state (running with health status), and assigned IPv4/IPv6 addresses. The layout is structured with columns for Name, Kind/Image, State, and IP Addresses, using a dark background with white text for readability. This table likely represents a lab environment setup, such as a Cisco networking lab or a virtualized testbed.
